summary: Iteration 154: PMS Decomposition Stage 2 - All tests passed. 59 route wiring tests + 22 API tests verified. Booking routes (10) extracted to pms_bookings.py, dashboard routes (3) extracted to pms_dashboard.py.

minor.issue: Pre-existing bug: RoomMoveHistory model requires old_check_in and new_check_in as required strings, but endpoint passes None when not provided. Returns 500 Internal Server Error.
minor.note: Not a regression from Stage 2 decomposition - existed before extraction

action_items: Optional: Fix pre-existing bug in POST /api/pms/room-move-history - make old_check_in and new_check_in optional in RoomMoveHistory model or validate input before creating model
critical_code_review_comments: Stage 2 decomposition successfully extracted 10 booking routes to pms_bookings.py and 3 dashboard routes to pms_dashboard.py
Router registry correctly includes pms_bookings and pms_dashboard routers (lines 35-36)
All 59 PMS routes are wired and return non-404 status codes
pms_shared.py contains pure helper get_guest_name - correctly follows project convention
No behavior changes detected - all routes work identically to before decomposition
Pre-existing bug found: POST /api/pms/room-move-history fails with 500 when old_check_in/new_check_in not provided (not a regression)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 154 verified PMS decomposition Stage 2. Key tests: (1) 59 PMS route wiring regression test - all routes return non-404, (2) Dashboard routes (GET /api/pms/dashboard, GET /api/pms/operational-alerts, GET /api/pms/room-alternatives/101) - all pass, (3) Booking routes (GET/POST /api/pms/bookings, POST /api/pms/quick-booking, POST /api/bookings/{id}/approve, POST /api/bookings/{id}/reject) - all pass, (4) Remaining pms.py routes (room-services, room-blocks, staff-tasks, setup-status, reservations/search, rooms/queue/list) - all pass. Pre-existing bug: POST /api/pms/room-move-history returns 500 when old_check_in/new_check_in not provided.

dashboard_routes_pms_dashboard_py.GET /api/pms/dashboard: PASS - returns total_rooms, occupied_rooms, available_rooms, occupancy_rate
dashboard_routes_pms_dashboard_py.GET /api/pms/operational-alerts: PASS - returns alerts array and summary
dashboard_routes_pms_dashboard_py.GET /api/pms/room-alternatives/101: PASS - returns same_type and other_type alternatives

booking_routes_pms_bookings_py.POST /api/pms/quick-booking: PASS - validation works (rejects empty guest name)
booking_routes_pms_bookings_py.POST /api/pms/room-move-history: PASS - works with valid data (old_check_in, new_check_in required)

test_classes: TestBookingRoutes (6 tests) - GET/POST bookings, approve/reject, override-logs, room-move-history
TestRemainingPmsRoutes (9 tests) - room-services, room-blocks, staff-tasks, setup-status, allotment-contracts, group-reservations, rooms/queue/list, reservations/search
TestBookingIntegration (2 tests) - quick-booking validation, create booking with Idempotency-Key
TestHealthCheck (2 tests) - auth login, API health

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are backed by real MongoDB queries.
